summary: Comprehensive testing of tamper-proof rating history feature with SHA-256 blockchain-style chain hashing. All 18 backend tests passed. All 14 frontend UI tests passed. Features working: Rating history with chain hashes, cryptographic verification endpoint, rating certificate with journey stats, timeline chart, expandable match history records showing hash/prev_hash/opponents/confirmations.
passed_tests: GET /api/rating/history/{userId} - Returns rating records with hash fields
GET /api/rating/certificate/{userId} - Returns player, verification, journey, timeline
Chain integrity - SHA-256 hash recomputation matches stored record_hash
Chain integrity - First record has prev_hash = GENESIS hash
Record content - Contains opponent_snapshot with name and rating_at_time
Record content - Contains confirmations from the match
Match result flow - Creates rating_history records automatically
View other player - Can view another player's rating history
View other player - Can view another player's rating certificate
View other player - Can verify another player's chain integrity
Leaderboard - Returns player IDs for profile navigation
frontend_tests_passed: Rating Profile page loads with data-testid='rating-profile-page'
Chain Integrity section visible with status cards
Verify Now button triggers chain verification
Verification badge shows 'Verified Rating' (green) when chain intact
Expandable history records show SHA-256 hash
Expandable history records show prev_hash chain link
Expandable history records show opponent snapshots with ratings
Expandable history records show confirmation count
Can view other player's rating profile with all sections
critical_code_review_comments: SHA-256 chain hash implementation is correct - each record_hash includes prev_hash in computation
GENESIS_HASH constant used for first record's prev_hash as expected
Verification endpoint properly validates entire chain by recomputing all hashes
opponent_snapshot captures opponent name and rating_at_time for historical accuracy
Timeline data structure well-suited for frontend chart rendering
All data-testid attributes present for UI automation testing
seed_data_creation: Backend test created TEST_RATING_CHAIN match via API to verify rating_history record creation. Additional matches created during testing - Arjun Kumar now has 3 rating_history records.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tamper-proof rating history fully tested and working. SHA-256 chain hashing verified - each record's hash includes prev_hash in computation. GENESIS hash is the starting point for the chain. Match result confirmation creates rating_history records automatically with opponent snapshots and confirmations. All 3 API endpoints (history, verify, certificate) working correctly. Frontend profile page shows rating card, chart, chain verification, and expandable match history. Leaderboard rows are clickable and navigate to player profiles. Glicko-2 rating system continues to work correctly after chain history integration.

mocked_apis.Razorpay payment processing: MOCKED - payment gateway falls back to mock mode when no gateway keys configured

rating_history_endpoint.details: GET /api/rating/history/{userId} returns records with user_id, match_id, seq, previous_rating, new_rating, delta, result, team, opponent_snapshot, confirmations, timestamp, prev_hash, record_hash

rating_verify_endpoint.details: GET /api/rating/verify/{userId} returns verified, chain_intact, rating_consistent, total_records, first_record_hash, last_record_hash, message

rating_certificate_endpoint.details: GET /api/rating/certificate/{userId} returns player (id, name, skill_rating, tier), verification, journey (peak_rating, lowest_rating, wins/losses/draws), timeline

chain_integrity.details: SHA-256 hashes verified by recomputation, prev_hash chain validated from GENESIS to last record

match_result_creates_history.details: Confirming match result creates rating_history records for all players with opponent snapshots

frontend_rating_profile.details: Shows rating card with tier badge, rating chart (canvas), chain integrity section, verify button, expandable match history

frontend_leaderboard_navigation.details: Leaderboard rows are clickable and navigate to /profile/{userId}

view_other_player_profile.details: Any authenticated user can view another player's rating profile, history, and chain verification

glicko2_integration.details: Glicko-2 rating updates continue to work correctly after chain history integration
